task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into NOSH ChartingSystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard is visible, showing the provider logged in (e.g., demo_provider or Dr. James Carter at Hillside Family Medicine).

task_completion.description: Verify the chart for patient Crystal Schroeder is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active patient context or chart header displays the name 'Crystal Schroeder' and/or DOB 'July 19, 1972'.

task_completion.description: Verify a new encounter is created with the type 'Office Visit' and dated today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An encounter form or summary is visible with the encounter type set to 'Office Visit' and the date matching the current system date.

task_completion.description: Verify the assessment includes 'Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the encounter's Assessment section (or equivalent field), the text 'Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus' is entered or selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the plan includes the specified instructions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the encounter's Plan section (or equivalent field), the text 'Continue metformin 500mg twice daily, follow up in 3 months' is entered.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the NOSH web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the NOSH ChartingSystem UI, not terminal windows executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs for the assessment and plan are entered into the actual NOSH ChartingSystem encounter forms, not a generic text editor like Notepad or gedit.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manipulate the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing MySQL/MariaDB prompts or SQL INSERT statements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Crystal Schroeder (DOB: 1972-07-19, PID: 18). Provider: demo_provider (Dr. James Carter). Practice: Hillside Family Medicine.
